creator: nc@FreeBSD.org
text:
Whenever I start a VM on VirtualBox 5.2.34 and set the networking to bridge mode, my system freezes. This makes it impossible to test networks in VMs unless I use bhyve, which then lacks a GUI and doesn't support bridge mode on my laptop's Wi-Fi, downgrade to 12.x, or use another OS.

System: FreeBSD 13.0-CURRENT r358869 on HP ProDesk 400 G4 - i7-7700, 24GB DDR4 RAM, MSI nVidia GT 1030. I used the packages to install VirtualBox.
